message:
fix: dashboard header wraps when sidebar narrows content + demo missions load (#5356)

Two fixes:

1. Dashboard header flex-wrap: tip bubble and warning badge squashed
   together when AI Mission sidebar was open. Added flex-wrap + gap-4
   to the header container and min-w-0 on the left side so elements
   wrap gracefully at narrow widths instead of overlapping.

2. Demo missions not loading: localStorage with empty [] array
   bypassed the demo fallback. Now checks for empty array in demo
   mode and returns demo missions instead.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
